description: Manage driver availability through online/offline status toggling, controlling whether a driver appears as available for order dispatch and location tracking.

actors.name: Driver
actors.description: Sets their own availability status via the driver app.

actors.name: Platform
actors.description: Uses driver online status to determine dispatch eligibility.

actors.name: Operator
actors.description: Can view and manage driver availability from the operator console.

fields.name: online
fields.label: Whether the driver is currently available for orders.

fields.name: current_job_id
fields.label: Reference to the active order if the driver is currently on a job.

fields.name: city
fields.label: City the driver is currently operating in (auto-resolved from location).

fields.name: country
fields.label: Country the driver is currently in (auto-resolved from location).

values.description: Driver is online and available to receive order pings.
Driver is offline and will not receive order dispatches.

transitions.description: Driver goes online to start their shift.
Driver goes offline to end their shift.

rules.rule_01: Only drivers with online=true are eligible to receive adhoc order pings.
rules.rule_02: A driver going offline while on an active order retains the current job until it is completed or reassigned.
rules.rule_03: Driver online status is tracked as a boolean field on the driver record.
rules.rule_04: The platform filters for online drivers when computing nearby available drivers for adhoc dispatch.
rules.rule_05: A driver's city and country are automatically updated from reverse geocoding during location updates.
rules.rule_06: Driver status (active, inactive, on_break) provides finer-grained availability beyond the online boolean.

given: driver updates their status to online via the app
driver_goes_online.result: Driver appears as available in dispatch queries and begins receiving order pings.

given: driver updates their status to offline via the app
driver_goes_offline.result: Driver is no longer dispatched new orders and disappears from active driver lists.

given: platform queries for available drivers near a pickup location

then.description: Driver is included in the result set for dispatch consideration.

driver_available_for_dispatch.result: Driver is a candidate for order assignment or adhoc ping.

given: driver is offline OR has an active current_job
driver_unavailable_for_dispatch.result: Driver is excluded from dispatch queries.

related.reason: Dispatch eligibility depends on driver online status.
Location updates typically only flow when driver is online.
Driver app controls the online/offline toggle.

goals.description: Manage driver availability through online/offline status toggling, controlling whether a driver appears as available for order dispatch and location tracking.

success_metrics.measurement: Successful operations divided by total attempts

human_checkpoints: before transitioning to a terminal state

tradeoffs.reason: workflow steps must complete correctly before proceeding
